name: Compressor bearing degradation
description: Rising vibration and bearing temperature; falling efficiency
detection_pattern: High vibration; bearing temp drift; power increase
operational_impact: Reduced gas export capacity; potential trip
recommended_action: Inspect bearings and lube oil; reduce load if trend persists

name: Compressor surge proximity
recommended_action: Check anti-surge valve response and suction conditions

name: Pump seal leakage
detection_pattern: Rising vibration; falling flow; seal pot level change
recommended_action: Inspect seal system and plan maintenance window

name: Separator level instability
description: Poor level control or unstable inlet slugging
operational_impact: Liquid carryover risk and downstream upset
recommended_action: Tune level control; check inlet slugging and valve response

name: Fired heater efficiency drift
detection_pattern: Fuel flow increases while outlet temperature is flat or falling
recommended_action: Check burner performance and schedule cleaning assessment

name: Column flooding or tray loading
detection_pattern: Differential pressure increase; top temperature instability
operational_impact: Product quality risk and throughput constraint
recommended_action: Reduce charge rate; inspect operating envelope and draw balance
